titleStmt.title: SII 38.216: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 216. (A.R. No. 216 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the Kāḷi shrine, inside the same temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakravarttigaḷ Vīrarājēndra (Kulōttuṅga I) Year 6: 1076 A.D.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription records that Peruntagai Paḍampakka-nāyagaṉ Tiruvēgambam uḍaiyāṉ Mūvēndaraiyaṉ, Tuṇaḻininṟa Sōdi Iraviśuram-uḍaiyāṉ alias Gurukularāyaṉ and Aruḷāḷapperumāḷ Śeṅgaram-uḍaiyāṉ, the residents of Vēḻsāṟupaḍiyūr, a village owned by the temple of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻar-kōṭṭam had received four and quarters māḍai from Maruṅkūr-uḍaiyāṉ Chandrasēkharaṉ Aḻaga Jñānasambandaṉ, (a resident) of Paḷuvūr in Dāmar-kōṭṭam for conducting special food offerings (to the god at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr) on the occasion of uttarāyaṇa, commencing from the month of Chittirai. It is also stated that the commodities required for conducting the above food offering were to be met out of the interest of the gifted amount and these were to be supplied at the temple kitchen (for preparing the foodofferings). It is also mentioned that this transaction were also to be engraved on stone.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśi .
tribhuva (tiripuva)ṉaccakravattikaḷ cirivirarājentira coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu
tāmaṟkoṭṭattu paḷuvūr maruṅkūruṭaiyāṉ cantiracekaraṉ Aḻakañā
ṉa campantaṉ cāntāraikkāppāṉāṉa Aḻakaṉñāṉacampantan pakkal puḻaṟ
koṭṭattu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyanāyaṉār tevamaṇṭalattu
Ūrkaḷil veḻcāṟu paṭiyūṟ peruntakai paṭampakkaṉāyakaṉ tiruvekampamu
ṭaiyāṉ muventaraiyaṉum tūṇaḻiniṉṟa cotiiravicura muṭaiyāṉāṉa kurukula
rāyaṉum Aruḷāḷapperumāḷ ceṅkaramuṭaiyāṉum Immuvom Ivvāṇṭu mutalu
ttara Ayaṉacciṟappukku poṉ koṇṭu poliyūṭṭāka Ivvāṇṭai cittirai māca
ttup pūrvapakkaṣattu nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa māṭainālekāl Immāṭai nāle kālu
m kaikkoṇṭu Ivvāṇṭai Uttaraayaṉa mutal ciṟappuamutu ceytaruḷa koyiṟkāl
Aḷakkum Aricikalamum paruppuamutu nāṉāḻiyum palavaṟkattil kaṟi Amutu nirai Irunūṟṟuppalamum
vāḻaippaḻam Irupattaiñcum teṅkāy Aiñcum miḷaku Uḻakkum ney muvuḻakkum tayir nāṉāḻiyum tiru
ppukkaṭṭi Irunāḻiyum Uppunāḻiyum
Aṭaikkāy Amutupākku pattum Ilai
amutu paṟṟukālum veṇṭuṅ kucakkalamum
viṟakum melāṭai nālekālukkum po
liyūṭṭāka Ivvāṇṭu mutal Āṇṭu to
ṟum Eṭuttuk koṇṭu vantu tarumaṭaippaḷḷipRead tirumaṭaippaḷḷi
paṇṭārattile Ivaṟkāka koṇṭuvantu Amutu
ceyvikka kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi can
tirātittavarai celuttakkaṭavomākavum tiruma
laiyile cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭuttom veṣa
cāṟupaṭiyūr peruntakai paṭampakkanāyakaṉ tiruve
kampamuṭaiyāṉ muventaraiyanum miraṇaṉṟa coti
Irayicuramuṭaiyāṉ kurukularāyaṉum Aruḷāḷap perumāIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
